expected_actions.reason: Use ONE scaffold_oppm_form action instead of ~80 individual actions. This deterministic action emits the complete authentic OPPM layout: header, task rows, bottom matrix, borders, fonts, alignment, row heights, column widths, and frozen rows. (from sheet-actions.yaml: scaffold is the recommended approach for full-form creation)

notes: AI used scaffold_oppm_form instead of individual actions for reliability
Scaffold produces a faithful Clark Campbell OPPM form every time
Scaffold handles: header (rows 1-5), task rows (6-29), identity strip (36-41), matrix (42-54), summary (55-66)
Scaffold applies all borders, fonts, alignment, row heights, column widths automatically
Total actions: 1 (scaffold) vs ~80 individual actions — much more reliable
After scaffold, AI can fill individual task titles, timeline dots, and owner names with set_value
